name: easyship
description: Easyship shipping tools for OpenAI Codex — get rates, create shipments, buy labels, track packages, and manage pickups across 550+ couriers worldwide

interface.shortDescription: Compare shipping rates, create shipments, buy labels, and track packages across 550+ couriers.
interface.longDescription: Access Easyship's global shipping platform from your editor. Compare rates from 550+ couriers, create shipments with auto-selected or specific couriers, buy and download labels, track packages in real time, schedule pickups, validate addresses, and view shipping analytics — all without leaving your workflow.
defaultPrompt: What are the shipping options for a 1.5kg package from Hong Kong to New York?
Create a shipment from San Francisco to London
What are my top shipping destinations this quarter?
